sources.title: Amazon Support Engineer Salary | Levels.fyi
sources.note: L4 total $123K (base $102K, stock $14.9K/yr, bonus $6.5K); L5 total $154K (base $130K, stock $14.3K, bonus $10K)

sources.title: Amazon Cloud Support Engineer Salary | Levels.fyi
sources.note: L4 total $128K (base $102K); L5 total $172K (base $121K) — corroborates base anchor

sources.title: Senior Technical Support Engineer: Average Salary & Pay Trends | Glassdoor
sources.note: 90th percentile ~$216,977 across all companies/industries; not MAG7-specific, weak comparator only

sources.title: AI Support Engineer - San Francisco | OpenAI (job posting, not directly accessible)
sources.note: Could not fetch directly (403); secondary search snippet cited estimated $120K-$150K base, another source cited $180K — inconsistent and unverified

sources.title: Customer Support Engineer: Average Salary & Pay Trends | Glassdoor
sources.note: Blended across all company sizes/industries: avg $126,627, 25th-75th pctile $101,684-$159,461 — directionally consistent but not tier-specific
